_comment: americomputadora — hook melody. D major, 112 BPM. The three vocal samples (whole-word clips, not per-syllable) get autotuned to these target MIDI notes at render time. Each hook is 4 beats: america fills 1 beat, computer 1 beat, dora 2 beats (the resolution lands and rings).

hook._variant_note: 4 melodic variants used across the 4 hook reps per chorus so the hook isn't identical 4× in a row. classic bubblegum trick — same rhythm, slightly different melody contour.

bed._progression_note: I — V — vi — IV. canonical bubblegum loop (Sugar Sugar / Baby One More Time pre-chorus / countless others). 8 bars total, repeats.
